action.description:
Introduced by Senators Smith, L. Johnson, Carpenter, Dassler-Alfheim, Roys, Drake, Spreitzer, Larson, Ratcliff and Hesselbein; 
cosponsored by Representatives Emerson, Phelps, Sinicki, Prado, Rivera-Wagner, Moore Omokunde, Clancy, Madison, Snodgrass, DeSmidt, Joers, Miresse, Stubbs, Tenorio and Roe
